parameters.query: =SELECT p.name, p.price, p.stock, p.unit, p.description, COALESCE(u.shop_name, u.name) as seller_name, u.phone, u.address FROM products p JOIN users u ON p.seller_id = u.id WHERE p.is_active = 1 {{ $node["Classify Intent"].json.searchQuery.length > 1 ? "AND p.name LIKE '%" + $node["Classify Intent"].json.searchQuery + "%'": "" }} LIMIT 5;

=SELECT shop_name, name as seller_name, phone, address, shop_description FROM users WHERE role = 'Petani' AND shop_name IS NOT NULL {{ $node["Classify Intent"].json.searchQuery.length > 1 ? "AND shop_name LIKE '%" + $node["Classify Intent"].json.searchQuery + "%'": "" }} LIMIT 5;
=SELECT order_number, total_price, status, created_at FROM orders WHERE buyer_id = {{ $node["Classify Intent"].json.user.id || 0 }} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;

=SELECT order_number, total_price, status, shipping_address, notes, created_at FROM orders WHERE order_number = '{{ $node["Classify Intent"].json.orderNumber }}' {{ $node["Classify Intent"].json.user.role === 'Pembeli' ? "AND buyer_id = " + $node["Classify Intent"].json.user.id : "" }} LIMIT 1;
